{{RewardIconWithLink|Research Briefcase|orange}} will reward +60 Research Manuals (random types).

Normally Research Manuals can be bought from the [[Club#Club_Shop|Club Shop]], earned through doing [[Nursery#Chore_Dispatch|Chores]], or given as rewards. These Manuals can then be used to train [[Partners]].

[[Category:Club]]
[[Category:Chores]]
[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Reward Pack]]
